name: blackraptor-council
description: An 11-seat executive advisory council convened through a challenge protocol (sourced evidence, confidence labels, counter-case, voice-of-customer, 'what you lose'). Seats: gtm-strategy, pricing-strategy, finance, market-insight, ethics-governance, revenue, people-org, technology-strategy, fundraising-ir, growth-engine — coordinated by the council-orchestrator, with the shared `product-manager` (via the auto-installed `blackraptor-bridge` plugin) as the product/strategy anchor. Ships the `council` skill: say 'convene the council' (or /council) to run the whole protocol.
